articles.summary: Hi HN, I'm Malachy, the founder of Tracecast. This project lets you generate interactive data apps on top of your data, using a Cursor-style AI chat. articles.title: Google’s AI future demands trust — and your personal data

Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
articles.summary: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

articles.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
articles.summary: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

articles.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
articles.summary: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

articles.title: Elon Musk said Sam Altman ‘stole’ a non-profit — but the trial showed he had similar aims
articles.summary: The jury's speedy decision to reject Elon Musk's lawsuit against the other founders of OpenAI and Microsoft confirmed what we saw in the courtroom: Musk's case was a weak one, in part because he waited so long to file it.

articles.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
articles.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

articles.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
articles.summary: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

articles.title: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
articles.summary: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

articles.title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
articles.summary: Pre-training is responsible for the large-scale training runs that give Claude its core knowledge and capabilities, according to the company. It's also one of the most expensive, compute-intensive phases of building a frontier model.

articles.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
articles.summary: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.
